text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Mrgh... The teachers just don't get it. Parties make people happy—they're exciting! "Disturbance," my foot...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Snacks, games, music! It just ain't a party if all my
friends aren't there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If I can't have one in the courtyard... I know! I'll
hold one near the dorms! I'm sure Hishiama'll give
me the okay!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I just need confetti-filled balloons, a bubble
machine... and 'course, a big ol' barbeque! Hehe, I
can't wait!
